name: Jambalaya (Chef Du Jour)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup pickled pork, boiled with seafood boil
1/3 cup Tasso ham, diced and sauteed
1 cup skinless chicken, sauteed and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion, green pepper, and celery.
2. Minimally mince the garlic and chop the jalapeno pepper.
3. Slice the Andouille sausage into thin strips.
4. Dice the pickled pork and Tasso ham.
5. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
6. Add all ingredients to a 4-quart saucepan.
7. Cook over low heat for 10-15 minutes, allowing the vegetables to soften.
8. Stir in Poultry Magic and Seafood Magic, followed by freshly ground black pepper and white pepper.
9. Add hot sauce and chicken stock until the mixture is just covered.
10. Simmer until thickened, about 15 minutes.
11. Stir in raw shrimp and cooked rice.
12. Mix in chopped parsley and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
13. Serve immediately.
